title: Better Sticks
description: More Usability for sticks! Create Long Sticks, Bundles of Sticks, Bo-Staffs, and even craft Scaffolding with only sticks
body:
![Image of Minecraft Inventory with Bundle of Sticks, Long Stick, and Bo-Staff](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9db61dcb26504616df82fd7d0198fb5e57990899.png)
# Better Sticks
## Summary
Better Sticks provides more functionality for sticks. This includes two new weapons, an alternative fuel source, and an alternative crafting recipe for scaffolding
## All Features
### Long Sticks
A weapon craftable with 2 sticks. It does 3 attack and 5 attack speed, with a durability of 20. Useful for when you don't have a crafting table and need a weapon very quickly
### Bundle of Sticks
An item craftable from 9 sticks. It can be used as a fuel source and lasts 100 seconds
### Bo-Staff
A weapon craftable with a long stick and 2 diamonds. It does 9 attack and 8 attack speed, with a durability of 1000. It's a very good alternative to the diamond sword, with two-thirds of the durability
### New Scaffolding recipe
Scaffolding can now be crafted using 8 Bundles of Sticks surrounding a single Stick. Very useful if you don't have access to bamboo


_Hello from Hackclub_
